user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate TC387 3-phase inverter PWM to new AURIX target with center-aligned complementary PWM at 20 kHz on GTM.TOM1 Cluster_1, 1.0 µs deadtime (rising/falling), 1.0 µs minPulse, sync start and sync shadow updates, percent-based duty ramp every 500 ms, and a period callback; plus a 1 kHz GTM ATOM0 CH0 ISR to toggle LED P13.0.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate three complementary half-bridge PWM pairs (U,V,W) with center-aligned waveform and enforced deadtime/minPulse, start and update all pairs synchronously, ramp U/V/W duty using shadow + sync at 500 ms intervals, and run a separate 1 kHz ATOM0 CH0 ISR to toggle P13.0. Guard GTM enable and CMU clocks so existing configuration is not disturbed if already enabled.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified IfxGtm_Pwm driver to configure 3-phase complementary PWM on TOM1 TGC1 with deadtime and minPulse, enable sync start/update, and apply percent-based duty via IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDuty at 500 ms cadence (delay computed with STM0). Ensure GTM is enabled and FXCLK0 is clocked via IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable and IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks. Configure P02.x PWM pins via the driver's pin config (no explicit PinMap calls when using unified). Implement an empty period callback IfxGtm_periodEventFunction (hooked via driver interrupt config if used). Separately, configure GTM ATOM0 CH0 at 1 kHz and route SR0 with priority 20 using IfxSrc/IfxCpu_Irq; toggle LED P13.0 with IfxPort APIs.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level PWM on TC3xx supports center-aligned complementary channels, deadtime, minPulse, sync start/update, and provides explicit multi-channel duty update APIs, simplifying a 3-phase inverter. It also aligns with the locked driver requirement and template-verified APIs.

runtime_function.name: GTM_TOM_3PhaseInverterPWM_updateDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply percent-based duty updates for U/V/W via shadow buffers and trigger a synchronous update; toggle LED P13.0 in 1 kHz ATOM ISR.

driver_changes: Upgraded PWM control to unified IfxGtm_Pwm per locked recommendation while preserving complementary behavior, deadtime, minPulse, and sync start/update semantics.
migration_notes.context_preserved: All user-specified behaviors are maintained: 3-phase complementary center-aligned PWM on TOM1 TGC1 with 1.0 µs deadtime/minPulse, sync start/update, 500 ms duty ramp using shadow + sync, empty period callback hook, GTM/CMU guard enablement, and a separate 1 kHz ATOM0 CH0 ISR toggling P13.0.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
